---
title: "Free-for-all"
---

# My Favorite Recipes 

## Chocolate Chip Cookies 

![](images/clipboard-2809950226.png)

::: contact-box
[Best Chocolate Chip Cookies](https://www.allrecipes.com/recipe/10813/best-chocolate-chip-cookies/)
:::

## Chicken Adobo **Filipino** 

![](photos/adobo.png){width="686"}

::: contact-box
[Open recipe](https://panlasangpinoy.com/filipino-chicken-adobo-recipe/)
:::

![](photos/pandesal.png){width="693" height="507"}

::: contact-box
[Open recipe](https://www.rivertenkitchen.com/soft-buttery-pandesal.html)
:::

## Creamy French Onion Orzo 

![](photos/orzo.png){width="679" height="472"}

::: contact-box
[Open recipe](https://www.delish.com/cooking/recipe-ideas/a63637314/creamy-french-onion-orzo-recipe/)
:::
